metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills and plugins

plugins.name: quorum
plugins.description: Debate a design question with N agents arguing different positions, then synthesize a recommendation.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Parallel code review with 4 agents: principles (SRP/design), hygiene (reuse/patterns/idioms), test (pyramid/coverage), security (PII/secrets). Pre-fetches diff, task-based checklists. Includes bundled coding standards and testing philosophy docs.
